name: help-article
description: Help center documentation, FAQs, knowledge base articles, how-to guides
usage_hint: Use for help center docs, FAQs, knowledge base articles, troubleshooting guides, and how-to content. The reader has a specific problem to solve. Not for blog posts or marketing tutorials.

criteria.name: response-resolution
criteria.description: A help article fails if the reader still can't solve their problem

criteria.name: readability
criteria.description: Users in support mode are frustrated; clarity reduces escalations

criteria.name: technical-accuracy
criteria.description: Inaccurate help content causes more support tickets, not fewer

criteria.name: information-architecture
criteria.description: Logical structure lets users skip to what they need

criteria.name: accessibility-inclusivity
criteria.description: Help content must be usable by all customers

criteria.name: seo-effectiveness
criteria.description: Help articles rank for long-tail queries and reduce support volume

criteria.name: tone-alignment
criteria.description: Consistent tone builds trust even in support contexts
